sp_widget.client_script: api.controller=function() { /* widget controller */ var c = this;};
sp_widget.name: Toy Homepage Search
sp_widget.option_schema: [{"name":"typeahead_search","default_value":"{title: 'How can we help?', size: 'lg', color: 'default'}","section":"Presentation","label":"Typeahead Search","type":"string"}]
sp_widget.template:
Olá {{data.userName}},
como posso te ajudar?
